Off Calendar Jan-03-2002 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE:
James W. Lucey, Esq. of CARR & FERRELL LLP 658-4100 for defendant NET VALUE HOLDINGS, INC. opposing party

The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
1. Deny Plaintiff's moton for reconsideration of the Court's order granting summary judgment as to defendant NET VALUE HOLDINGS, INC. and
2. Deny Plaintiff's motion to tax costs.
